text: {"type":"escalate","finding":"__main__.py unused imports","severity":"Useful","description":"server/tmux_status_server/__main__.py imports parse_args and warn_if_exposed from config but never calls them. It delegates entirely to server.main(). The unused imports add confusion about the entry point flow. However, tests in test_package.py (lines 78-106) and test_server.py explicitly check for these imports.","options":[{"label":"Remove unused imports, update tests","solution":"Remove parse_args and warn_if_exposed imports from __main__.py, update or remove tests that check for them","pros":"Cleaner code, tests verify actual behavior","cons":"Touches 3 files, requires deciding what tests should verify instead"},{"label":"Keep as-is","solution":"Leave unused imports since they are harmless and tests document the contract","pros":"No change, no risk of breaking tests","cons":"Misleading imports remain"}],"recommendation":"Option 1, but needs careful review of which tests to update vs remove."}
{"type":"user-decision","approach":"Remove unused imports (parse_args, warn_if_exposed) from __main__.py and update/remove tests that check for them."}
